description: Add headers parameter to fetch(), but README has no fence markers
input:
diff --git a/src/main.py b/src/main.py
--- a/src/main.py
+++ b/src/main.py
@@ -4,7 +4,7 @@
-def fetch(url: str) -> dict:
+def fetch(url: str, headers: dict = None) -> dict:

baseline_expected.behavior: Detects param change, rewrites both docstring AND README prose section

skill_expected.behavior: Detects [PARAM], auto-writes docstring, PROPOSES (not auto-writes) README update

skill_wins_because: Trust boundary — docstrings are machine-owned (auto-write), unfenced README is human-owned (propose only)
